'''ranasha''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:docimology|docimology]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| r-n-sh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:docimology|docimology]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| ranasha
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:rænæshæth|rænæshæth]] || [[word:rænæshæj|rænæshæj]] || [[word:rænæshæsh|rænæshæsh]] || [[word:rænæshæ|rænæshæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:rananashath|rananashath]] || [[word:rananashaj|rananashaj]] || [[word:rananashash|rananashash]] || [[word:rananasha|rananasha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:ranashath|ranashath]] || [[word:ranashaj|ranashaj]] || [[word:ranashash|ranashash]] || [[word:ranasha|ranasha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:ranafshafth|ranafshafth]] || [[word:ranafshafj|ranafshafj]] || [[word:ranafshafsh|ranafshafsh]] || [[word:ranafshaf|ranafshaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:ranashatha|ranashatha]] || [[word:ranashaja|ranashaja]] || [[word:ranashasha|ranashasha]] || [[word:ranashaka|ranashaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:ranashath|ranashath]] || [[word:ranashaj|ranashaj]] || [[word:ranashash|ranashash]] || [[word:ranasha|ranasha]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:ranashathal|ranashathal]] || [[word:ranashajal|ranashajal]] || [[word:ranashashal|ranashashal]] || [[word:ranashakal|ranashakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:ranashaathatha|ranashaathatha]] || [[word:ranashaajaja|ranashaajaja]] || [[word:ranashaashasha|ranashaashasha]] || [[word:ranashaaka|ranashaaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:ranashathan|ranashathan]] || [[word:ranashajan|ranashajan]] || [[word:ranashashan|ranashashan]] || [[word:ranashakan|ranashakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:ranashathaoro|ranashathaoro]] || [[word:ranashajaoro|ranashajaoro]] || [[word:ranashashaoro|ranashashaoro]] || [[word:ranashakaoro|ranashakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|1a7b009}}
